name: search
description: Search across all pages and databases in the Notion workspace that the integration has been shared with. Searches by page title and can filter results by object type (page or database). Results are sorted by relevance or last edited time.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The text to search for in page and database titles. If empty, returns all accessible pages.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific object type: { "property": "object", "value": "page" } or { "property": "object", "value": "database" }.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for results. Direction is 'ascending' or 'descending', timestamp is 'last_edited_time'.

parameters.name: start_cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (max 100, default 100).
